note: OTC non-intervention rationale + P2 improvements (Sentinel hardening + reputation room + scam-example education). Web/docs only. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. Non-custodial model preserved: no escrow, no dispute, no badges, no automated trade matching, no fund custody. (A) sost-otc.html: new "Why SOST does not intervene" section (legal/regulatory rationale, two-column "what SOST is today vs what SOST would become if it intervened", why-protects-user, why-protects-protocol, what-SOST-can-do, what-SOST-cannot-do, precedents Bisq / Hodl Hodl / AgoraDesk / LocalCoinSwap / LocalBitcoins). (B) sost-otc.html: new "Real scam examples" section with 4 anonymized annotated conversation transcripts (screenshot scam, move-to-DM + fake admin, advance-fee fraud, wallet-verification phishing) + recovery guide "If you have been scammed" (6 concrete steps). (C) website/js/sost-sentinel.js SCAM_PATTERNS extended with 10 more advanced patterns: advance-fee / activation-fee fraud, multiple-buyer scarcity pressure, last-warning / one-time-offer urgency, friend's-account redirection, wallet-verification phishing, seed-phrase requests (the cardinal sin), screen-share / TeamViewer / AnyDesk pressure, fake explorer-link proof, lookalike-domain typosquat (sost-verify.net etc.), and split-the-difference / pay-half-first fake compromise. (D) website/js/sost-talk.js: new room otc-rep with label "OTC Reputation (unverified)". Same Sentinel + rate-limit discipline as the OTC room. (E) website/sost-talk.html: new cyan safety banner for otc-rep explaining community-curated / SOST-does-not-verify / Sybil attack warning / posting format suggestion / no-doxxing rule. renderRoomTabs hook updated to toggle the new banner; maybeShowOtcChecklist trigger extended to fire for either otc or otc-rep (same pre-trade discipline). (F) docs/SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md: new "OTC Reputation Room Rules (community-curated, unverified)" section with hard invariants, suggested format, Sentinel-applies note, and explicit what-this-room-is-NOT list. (G) website/api/talk_messages.json: one official Sentinel intro seed pinned to the otc-rep room.
